title: RAF Lossiemouth: Locals evacuated and roads closed as 'suspicious package' discovered at military base

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Scotland head coach Gregor Townsend speaks ahead of Six Nations Ireland match Did you know with a Digital Subscription to The Scotsman, you can get unlimited access to the website including our premium content, as well as benefiting from fewer ads, loyalty rewards and much more. sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: This site is protected by reCAPTCHA and the Google Privacy Notice and Terms of Service apply. Personnel and locals were evacuated after a ‘suspicious package’ was discovered at RAF Lossiemouth on Thursday morning. The package was discovered during a routine security search and police were then alerted around 11.25am. In a statement at 4.50pm, it was confirmed the incident has ended after the Explosive Ordnance Disposal team confirmed the package contained nothing of concern.
